text:
I've tried now with cherry-picked commits

    00614c9c2ddc34f3f9061e87542efb4edbd936a9
    3540911bfdd83ce69d1c436f6773becefef403fa

No improvement unfortunately.

To provide some more debug info, I have enabled "LINUXKPI_DEBUG_80211" now and attached the linuxkpi-80211 traces. The desired WiFi-SSID is "VKF Legacy"...
